vocab.meaning: sự hiện diện ở khắp mọi nơi
vocab.example: Social media giants have a ubiquitous presence in Vietnam, with nearly everyone having at least one account.

vocab.meaning: nền tảng thương mại điện tử quyền lực/lớn mạnh
vocab.example: Shopee has emerged as an e-commerce powerhouse, attracting millions of monthly visitors across the country.

vocab.meaning: phục vụ cho (nhu cầu/đối tượng cụ thể)
vocab.example: There are numerous local news portals that cater specifically to the interests of the younger generation.

vocab.meaning: trình độ hiểu biết/sử dụng công nghệ số
vocab.example: As digital literacy improves, more people are flocking to educational websites to upgrade their professional skills.

vocab.meaning: trở nên cực kỳ phổ biến/thu hút sự chú ý lớn
vocab.example: Short-video platforms have gained immense traction among teenagers as a primary source of entertainment.

vocab.meaning: giao diện thân thiện với người dùng
vocab.example: Websites with a user-friendly interface tend to dominate the market as they are accessible even to the elderly.
Online forums for tech enthusiasts have proliferated in recent years, fostering large digital communities.

vocab.meaning: một nguồn thông tin/địa chỉ ưu tiên hàng đầu
vocab.example: For many Vietnamese people, Zalo has become a go-to source for both communication and daily news updates.

vocab.meaning: đối thủ/đơn vị thống trị thị trường
vocab.example: Google remains the dominant player in the search engine market, used by almost every internet user in the country.
While mainstream sites are popular, websites focusing on a niche market like high-end mechanical keyboards are also thriving.
